prompt: A dramatic anime theatrical movie poster in a tall vertical composition, centered on 2 young women in classic black-and-white maid uniforms standing back-to-back and facing opposite directions. The left maid has a short silver bob haircut with straight bangs and a white maid headband; the right maid has a short vivid pink bob haircut with straight bangs and a matching white maid headband. Both wear fitted black dresses with puff sleeves, white aprons with ruffled trim, white collars and cuffs, and black ribbon accents at the neck. Their poses are confident and tense, with one hand lowered at their sides, suggesting mystery and rivalry. Place them large in the foreground, filling most of the poster height. Behind them, create a split-color night sky: deep electric blue on the left and saturated magenta-pink on the right, blending at the center. In the upper left, show a bright full moon and a small helicopter with a searchlight. Along the horizon and lower sides, include a glowing city skyline, blue-lit on the left and pink-lit on the right. In the center background, place a gothic mansion or castle with pointed towers at the end of a path, illuminated with warm lights. In front of the mansion, show 2 smaller full-body figures of the same maids from behind, walking toward the building side by side. Add 4 supporting characters around the lower edges: 1 dark-haired man in a suit at bottom left, 1 older stern man in a suit at lower right-center, 1 young woman with long dark hair at bottom right, and the 2 small maid figures in the center distance, for a total of 6 visible human figures in the poster. Scatter bright pink flower petals across the image as if blown by the wind. Use intense cinematic lighting, glossy anime rendering, high contrast, sharp linework, glowing rim light, and a suspenseful psychological thriller mood. Include vertical Japanese tagline text on both sides, a large stylized title at the bottom center reading Re:maid, smaller Japanese subtitle text beneath it, and release text at the lower left reading 7.25 [FRI] ROADSHOW. Add a final Japanese tagline line along the bottom. Overall style: premium anime key visual, mystery thriller, neon blue and hot pink dual-color palette, polished poster typography, highly detailed background, dynamic petals, and theatrical film-poster finish.
